info.description: Main site navigation — top-level items and their dropdown children

top_strip_text.description: Tiny text strip across the very top of every page. Use middle-dot (·) between words, e.g. 'Stories · Work with Anna · Experiences · Shop · Community'. Each word between the dots auto-links to the matching main-nav item (case-insensitive, partial match works — 'Stories' matches 'Reset Stories'). Words that don't match anything in the main nav render as plain text.
top_strip_text.default: Stories · Work with Anna · Experiences · Shop · Community
